name: Boise Cascade Community Park
description: Boise Cascade Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Council, ID. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Meadow Creek Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Meadow Creek Resort in New Meadows, ID! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Meadows Valley High School
description: Meadows Valley High School is a place to play pickleball in New Meadows, ID. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
